basics.name: Zeyad Ismail Hamdalla
basics.label: Full-Stack Software Developer
basics.summary: Full-Stack developer with 1+ years of experience of building features and products in startups, with a passion for building functional software that optimizes workflows and improves the lives of its users, seeking opportunities to contribute to software and systems that propel people and businesses forward.

work.name: Rockai Dev
highlights: Served as the Primary Backend Developer behind a medium-sized (40K+ LOC) Real Estate platform, architecting and building a scalable backend that powers three frontend applications: a client-facing website, an internal Admin & Sales dashboard, a mobile application, and three AI services.

Architected and built a comprehensive event-logging system supporting advanced dashboard analytics, detailed audit logs, and user personalization to gather insights and help build an AI user recommendation system.
Contributed to the company’s flagship SaaS product Propai CRM by designing and owning the subscription, renewal, and provisioning modules.
Automated payments via Paymob and secured distributed server-to-server communication using encrypted JWT-based authentication.
Rebuilt the admin dashboard backend to support subscription management and customer support operations.
Systematically refactored legacy sections to improve overall system stability and maintainability.
Worked on the EATN app available on both Android & iOS, developed for the EATN 4 event held on May 15, 2026.
The platform served as an event companion application, similar to Techne Summit and Connecta, providing attendees with agenda management, session tracking, notifications, and event engagement tools.
Supported 3,000+ concurrent users during the event day.

work.name: Sputnik Academy
highlights: Worked in a team to develop a comprehensive ERP system custom-made to fit Sputnik Academy's needs as a quickly growing startup.
Developed a robust authentication & authorization system using RBAC and ABAC concepts with OAuth 2.0, borrowing concepts and best practices from identity platforms like Auth0.
Provided up-to-date internal documentation of the backend project, allowing new backend interns and team members to onboard quickly and contribute safely.

projects.name: Nirvalla Tasks
projects.description: A personal open-source full-stack task management app similar in functionality to Google Tasks.
highlights: Implemented drag-and-drop task reordering, nested subtasks, and list organization using React, Tailwind CSS, and DnD-Kit.
Designed the backend with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, emphasizing data ownership and user privacy.
Engineered the system for expandability, with future modules planned for calendar, journaling, and knowledge management.

projects.name: Spicy Tower
projects.description: A vertical arcade-style web game where players climb platforms to achieve a high score.
highlights: Built using JavaScript, HTML5 Canvas, and Kaplay.js game library.
Implemented responsive controls optimized for desktop and mobile browsers.
Implemented gameplay mechanics including increasing difficulty, shrinking platforms, music, and an AI-generated voice.

references.name: Moamen Osama (AI Engineer)
references.reference:
Working with Zeyad at RockAI was one of the most impactful professional experiences I've had. He wasn't just a backend developer. He was a mentor in the truest sense.

At a time when I was still finding my footing in backend systems, Zeyad never made me feel like the questions were too basic or the gaps too wide. He took the time to explain the "why" behind architectural decisions, not just the "how". And that distinction changed the way I think about engineering entirely.

Because of him, I can now collaborate confidently with any backend engineer, on any stack, in any context. That's not a small thing. That's the kind of growth that compounds over an entire career.

Zeyad brings rare technical depth, genuine patience, and the kind of quiet confidence that makes everyone around him better. Any team that gets him is lucky, and I mean that.

references.name: Mohamed Rshad (Flutter Developer / Software Engineer)
references.reference:
I had the pleasure of working with Zeyad on multiple projects, and one of the things that stood out most was his exceptional communication skills. As a Full Stack Developer, he has a unique ability to connect with frontend, backend, and mobile developers and explain ideas clearly while also understanding everyone’s perspectives equally well. He naturally becomes the bridge that keeps the team aligned.

Zeyad is one of the most organized people I’ve worked with, and his way of working positively influences everyone around him. We worked together on a large-scale project, EATN Event, under tight deadlines and heavy pressure, and he consistently delivered everything I needed on the backend side, which helped me complete my work efficiently and on time.

Beyond his technical skills, Zeyad is someone I personally learned a lot from both professionally and socially. Whenever I faced a challenge, he was often the person with a solution or valuable advice. He is highly reliable, trustworthy, supportive, and genuinely cares about helping his team succeed. I’m truly grateful to have worked with someone like him, and any team would lucky to have him.

references.name: Alaa Ahmed (UI/UX Designer & Framer Specialist)
references.reference:
I had the chance to work closely with Zeyad Ismail, and honestly he is one of the most dedicated and reliable full-stack developers I’ve worked with.

He is extremely detail-oriented, highly organized, and always able to manage projects in a structured and professional way. Whenever I work on a project, he’s one of the first people I ask for feedback because of how logical, smart, and thoughtful his thinking process is.

Ziad has a strong ability to take ownership of large projects, divide tasks efficiently, organize workflows, and handle responsibilities with confidence.

Beyond his technical skills, he is also a great speaker and communicator, which makes working with him very smooth and productive.

What really stands out about him is his passion for software and continuous learning.

He’s always improving himself, exploring new technologies, and helping everyone around him.

No matter the situation, he’s always supportive, a great listener, and someone the team can truly rely on.

I truly believe he has a very bright future ahead, and any team would be lucky to have him.

references.name: Bassem Hazem (Project Manager & Full-Stack Developer)
references.reference:
I am writing to highly recommend Zeyad I. Hamdalla, who worked with me as a Full Stack Software Developer for approximately seven months.

Throughout this time, Zeyad demonstrated an exceptional level of focus, self-organization, and technical proficiency, particularly in his backend development work. He consistently approached his tasks with a high standard of perfection, ensuring that every detail was carefully considered and properly tested.

Zeyad is extremely disciplined and strict about following processes. His curiosity about the codebase and his dedication to documentation were instrumental to maintaining high-quality outcomes. He leaves a strongly positive impact on the team, not only through his professional output but also by being a supportive and collaborative colleague.

Given his organizational skills and dedication, I am confident Zeyad would be an asset to any organization.

references.name: Ahmed Soliman (Software Engineer / Mid-Level Full-Stack Developer)
references.reference:
Zeyad is a remarkably talented software engineer and an even better colleague. I’ve had the privilege of working with him on several projects, where he consistently impressed me with his API and database design skills. What makes him truly unique is his sharp business acumen; Zeyad doesn't just write great code, he has a rare ability to deeply understand business goals and align his technical architecture to meet those specific needs.

He possesses a powerful combination of sharp logical thinking and rapid learning agility—he can pick up any new concept and implement it flawlessly in record time. Above all, his discipline, punctuality, and unwavering commitment to his word make him stand out. Zeyad is the kind of professional you rarely find in this industry, and he would be an invaluable asset to any team.

references.name: Mohamed Adel Eletewy (Software Developer / Programming Instructor)
references.reference: I had the pleasure of teaching Zeyad, and he’s one of the most creative and hardworking students I’ve met. He’s smart, detail-oriented, and always brings fresh ideas to the table. Any team would be lucky to have him.
